title: Mutation Testing with Slither - A New Way to Find High Severity Issues
description:
Guillermo Larregay, Security Engineer, Trail of Bits

Mutation testing is a new feature of Slither that points auditors and developers toward the least tested parts of a codebase. We'll show how to use the tool and provide some real-world examples of high-severity findings Slither's mutation testing has found.

https://defisecuritysummit.org/schedule
track: DeFi Security Summit 2025 - Nogal Stage - Day 1
